title: hieracium macrolepium
intro: Hieracium macrolepium, also known as large-leaved hawk's beard or large-leaved hawkbit, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hieracium macrolepium are said to include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
